channel.title: Accessibility on Stephen Simei Kimogol
channel.description: Recent content in Accessibility on Stephen Simei Kimogol

item.title: Accessibility of Digital Teaching Materials for Students with Visual Impairment
item.description: Public sector PhD on accessibility of digital teaching materials, conducted with Statped and OsloMet, funded by the Norwegian Research Council.

item.title: Accessibility Barriers Faced When Interacting with Digital Teaching Materials: A Case of High School Students with Visual Impairment in Norway
item.description: HCII 2024. Universal Access in Human-Computer Interaction. Conference paper, 2024.
